title: Kamilka's Changes
description: Kamilka's Changes is a mod which primarly focuses on shaking up and making  the progression of Minecraft a bit longer, with changing crafting recepies, textures and such without adding any new items to the game.
body:
# **A not so bloaty progression changer mod**
Most mods which shake up the progression system of Minecraft tend to add a bunch of, by definition useless items, even though the game originally features some which aren't really included for anything, so I decided to **change** some stuff up. 
(yes you can longer craft white beds just from white wools, you will need to die two of them red, and oh, for red dye you will have to smelt the flovers, which u need a furnace for)
![yes you can longer craft white beds just from white wools, you will need to die two of them red, and oh, for red dye you will have to smelt the flovers, which u need a furnace for](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc215ffd515ee2765222fecad63aa092d09d5f48.png)
## Changes from the get go
I felt Minecraft's early game was stupidly quick, going to stone tools was under a minute, but with this that phase of the game will take a bit longer. These early game fixes include a slightly more complex recipe for the crafting table, personally I always thought it was dumb that  it didn't need a leather, even though it looks like there's one on top of it,

![makes sense right?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/147177f3579da360c0f85c0ec4d674a075cc0d68.png)

(don't worry i made the item frame craftable in the inventory)

![don't worry i made the item frame craftable in the inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33178b2631ec6c2f1258c97cf37f052078ef390d.png)

then there's the furnace(yes you will need to gather 3 types of stone for it),

![yes you will need to gather 3 types of stone for it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0ff38232faa17d8a76e65f7bf44a11fd849083e.png)

and the pickaxes

![now this is a pick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97aecf7cb95200b4734de519af240af8fc67252d.png) 

and armors

![chainmail is craftable!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfc33cbca4301e6576a5decda6c7a5ca002f59a5.png) 

in the game. Oh, I almost forgot, you can no longer mine diamonds with anything but gold, and to craft iron armor you will need to go to the nether for quartz, and good luck gathering prismarines and sculk blocks for the eye of ender!

![it was so dumb that the "eng game" objective is strictly achievable without exploring the overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4950a88089f33b06e00a8b01598f1f802a62636.png) 

And how could I forget! You will actually have to defeat the nether, not just stripmine for it!

![now thats a worthy ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a625a869197c0a8159318cdb7f00384ce0751fc4.png)

Personally I highly recommend playing this mod with REI.
[https://modrinth.com/mod/rei](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)
